title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2025-12 dated October 10, 2025 entitled, "Resolution reverting the amount of Three Million Pesos (Php 3,000,000.00) under the 20% Municipal Development Fund CY 2020" current appropriations from Maintenance and Other Operating Expense to Capital Outlay for the development of Rest Area Phase 1 located at Brgy. Bambang, Los Baños, Laguna.
